hero.title: The Art of Sushi
hero.subtitle: Reinvented
hero.description: Japanese tradition meets contemporary creativity at two locations in Porto.

about.quote: Fusion Food is not just a technique — it's a philosophy that respects tradition while embracing innovation.
about.paragraph1: Since 2018, Sushi in Sushi combines authentic Japanese techniques with premium local ingredients. Each dish is a celebration of flavors, textures, and impeccable presentation.
about.paragraph2: With two locations in Porto, we bring the art of sushi closer to you, always maintaining our commitment to excellence and the freshness of our ingredients.

review1.name: Maria S.
review1.text: The best sushi ever! Everything is always very fresh, flavorful, and made to order. It's my favorite sushi and I recommend it without hesitation.

review2.name: João P.
review2.text: Best sushi I've ever had, the quality of the raw fish is incredible! The temakis, the sashimi, the nigiris… I'll definitely be back!

review3.name: Ana R.
review3.text: We loved the sushi. Everything was beautifully served and presented. Excellent value for money!

review4.name: Carlos M.
review4.text: Excellent food with many pieces and combinations. Very friendly and attentive service. Cozy atmosphere.

boavista.name: Boavista
boavista.address: Shopping Brasilia, R. Luís Veiga Leitão 116, 2nd floor, Porto

contact.title: Ready for an
contact.description: Make your reservation or order online for delivery and takeaway.
